"name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "The `recordSelectOptionsQuery()` method may be used to scope the options available in the `Select` field for `AttachAction` and `AssociateAction`. However, the built-in validation rule for these fields did not apply the same scope. As a result, a user who can trigger these actions could tamper with the Livewire component's state and submit an out-of-scope value.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00178, "percentile": 0.07488}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7q3w-xqjw-g3cr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-11T20:26:07Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7q3w-xqjw-g3cr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7q3w-xqjw-g3cr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48067"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-22T22:16:46Z", "published_at": "2026-06-11T20:26:07Z", "references": ["https://github.com/filamentphp/filament/security/advisories/GHSA-7q3w-xqjw-g3cr", "https://github.com/filamentphp/filament/releases/tag/v3.3.51", "https://github.com/filamentphp/filament/releases/tag/v4.11.4", "https://github.com/filamentphp/filament/releases/tag/v5.6.4", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48067", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7q3w-xqjw-g3cr"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/filamentphp/filament/security-advisories/GHSA-7q3w-xqjw-g3cr", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/filamentphp/filament", "summary": "Filament has inconsistent scope enforcement for its AttachAction and AssociateAction Select fields", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-18T17:26:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7q3w-xqjw-g3cr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.3.51", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "filament/tables"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, <= 3.3.50"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.11.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "filament/actions"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, <= 4.11.3"}, {"first_patched_version": "5.6.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "filament/actions"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.0.0, <= 5.6.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Filament has inconsistent scope enforcement for its AttachAction and AssociateAction Select fields
